snippets.title: Create, activate, install, deactivate
snippets.code:
python -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate        # macOS/Linux
# .venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1     # Windows PowerShell

python -m pip install --upgrade pip
python -m pip install openai langchain

deactivate
snippets.explanation: Everything between activate and deactivate operates inside the isolated env.

snippets.title: Confirm you're in the env
snippets.code:
which python                     # .../.venv/bin/python when active
python -c "import sys; print(sys.prefix)"   # points at the venv
pip -V                           # pip from the venv
snippets.explanation: sys.prefix and the python/pip paths reveal whether the venv is active.

snippets.title: Using virtualenv instead
snippets.code:
pip install virtualenv
virtualenv -p python3.11 .venv   # choose a specific interpreter
source .venv/bin/activate
snippets.explanation: virtualenv adds faster creation and easy interpreter selection; activation works the same way.
